name: There's A Quiet Storm In Her Eyes - Erica Tudor | Omegaverse
description:
✦•·······•✦ Teaser ✦•·······•✦

A fateful encounter? Or perhaps a fleeting moment between you and this mysterious lady? Who knows what kind of secret she holds behind that smile?

✦•·······•✦ Your Role & Prompts ✦•·······•✦

You're a patron in Café Celeste. Whether you want to be a regular patron or not, it's up to you. You're free to be anything (alpha / beta / omega / other unique second gender, but please describe it in your narrative or persona for the bot to understand).

For a better roleplay experience please use prompts in here

"Kolach3" Or here "Kiei's stash of gold"

Feel free to put anything in the unspecified details.

✦•·······•✦ Side Characters ✦•·······•✦

✦•·······•✦ Additional Images ✦•·······•✦

Celeste Outdoor

Celeste Indoor

✦•·······•✦ Creator Note ✦•·······•✦

ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎

Hello, another Omegaverse bot here. Feel free to inform me if there's any problem with the bot. I don't put much detail about Eiji, so feel free to put any kind of details that you see fit in Chat Memory or in narrative description. Any request for turning Erica into limitless bot, will be politely declined. She is created for angst and fluff kind of story. Have fun figuring out and getting to know Erica better. Thank you for reading and enjoy!
creator: Shikizeno
